data.body: 625b IMPLEMENTED (opus strong-tier, 1 attempt) + validated: 31 held-out tests GREEN (canonical golden equivalence A-F, partial-tolerance, assignee identity/email/both-empty match, runtime inbound-mapper injection proof, AST neutrality outbound_differ clean, vendor-key denylist). New module outbound_field_diff.py (397 LOC); outbound_differ.py at 800 cap. 9 diffing tests import-migrated to adapters.jira.outbound_fields.
